description_long: This SUV features a highly angular, geometric body with a metallic gray finish, reminiscent of the Tesla Cybertruck. The exterior is composed of flat, sharply defined panels, giving it a futuristic and armored appearance. The windows are large and tinted black, with a continuous, uninterrupted surface across the front windshield and side windows. The vehicle sits on oversized, rugged black tires with deep treads, suitable for both urban and off-road environments. The rear cargo bed is open and spacious, bordered by a solid tailgate with a horizontal red light bar. Subtle orange accent lights are integrated into the front corners, enhancing its modern, high-tech look.
description: A futuristic, angular metallic gray SUV with large black rugged tires, tinted windows, and an open rear cargo bed.
description_view_0: Front view shows a flat, wide nose with angular headlights and a seamless black windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sharp geometric lines, four doors, and large rugged tires.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open cargo bed and a horizontal red light bar across the tailgate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular body, four doors, and robust wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: Large black wheels with deep, rugged treads and simple, solid hub design
